name: California Quesadillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush one side of each tortilla lightly with melted butter.
2. Place the buttered side down on a baking sheet.
3. Arrange the diced pear, shredded Brie, and chopped dried figs on the bottom half of each tortilla.
4. Fold the tortillas in half over the fillings.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted, or heat on a medium-hot griddle until golden brown.
6. Cut each quesadilla into three wedges.
